obstacle_groups.label: Top bar — x=3..11, y=0..1, touches top edge; corners open
Top-left corner — x=0..1, y=0..3, touches top and left edges
Top-right corner — x=13..14, y=0..3, touches top and right edges
Left upper — x=0..2, y=5..8, touches left edge
Right upper — x=12..14, y=5..8, touches right edge
Central — x=6..8, y=8..10; first obstacle in laser path
Left lower — x=0..2, y=12..15, touches left edge
Right lower — x=12..14, y=12..15, touches right edge
Bottom-left corner — x=0..2, y=17..19, touches bottom and left edges
Bottom-right corner — x=12..14, y=17..19, touches bottom and right edges
